levelList.name: Yield My Flesh
levelList.desc:
Targets the Skill Slot that has the highest max Power
[WhenUse] Until this Skill ends:
- Take -2% damage from Attacks for every [Breath] on self (ต่ำสุด -80%)
- Clash Power -1 for every [Breath] on self (ต่ำสุด -30)
- Cannot be Staggered from taking damage
[WinDuel] ได้รับค่า [Breath] 5 หน่วย
[DefeatDuel] Use "สะบั้นกระดูก" after being hit
[EndBattle] Cannot use "Yield My Flesh" until ในเทิร์นถัดไป
